title: CYLINDER BLOCK — Disassembly: Piston and Crankshaft

figures_detected.description: Engine assembly viewed from front/side showing cylinder block and ancillary components
Engine stand adapter bracket assembly showing tools KV10115300 and KV10106500 with torque values 25-34 N·m (2.5-3.5 kg-m, 18-25 ft-lb)
Engine mounted on work stand ST0501S000

content_blocks.text:
When installing moving parts such as bearings and pistons, always apply new, unused engine oil on the contact surfaces.
Place disassembled parts such as bearings and bearing caps in correct order and direction.
When tightening connecting rod bolts and main bearing cap bolts, apply engine oil to threads and seating surface of nuts.

steps.text: Place engine on a work stand.
Remove timing chain. Refer to "Removal" in "TIMING CHAIN".
